item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7h Good couple of breaks at the end get Oli Lines past Ben Woollaston in a 10-8 epic. Liam High
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7h Good couple of breaks at the end get Oli Lines past Ben Woollaston in a 10-8 epic. Liam Highfield awaits.
Here's your line-up for Judgement Days.
Tasty. 1 4 26 1 mil

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7h Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degenerate
item.description: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 7h Still some decent ripples of applause being given out by the hardy souls/diehards/degenerates/perverts still gracing the EIS for this one deep into the night. 1 18 1 mil
